race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Extra Places Juvenile Hurdle (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed cloaks of gold at position 3 (18.0% probability) vs top pick Scarlet Moon (38.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~20.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Scarlet Moon > Love You Back, but actual result was Cloaks Of Gold > Scarlet Moon. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Cloaks Of Gold had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -4.2%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
